title: Rockwater Resort & Guitar Tower — Grand Scale
subtitle: Large-showcase minifig-ish scale: 7-story wing, ~30-band volumetric guitar tower, villa grid, lagoon
author: Max

sections.title: Podium
sections.note: 48x28 ground deck for the whole resort.

sections.title: Lagoon
sections.note: Large water feature, own ground plates.

bricks.note: Lay the full 48x28 podium first — the entire resort keys off its top surface (z=1).
Story 1 of 7 — solid-fill construction: every tile has a tile directly beneath it, all the way down.
Color break: upper stories switch to a lighter glass tier.
Tower base — 16 wide × 8 deep, the full mass of the lower bout. Solid volumetric core, not a flat wall.
Waist: narrows in BOTH width and depth — the pinch that reads as a real guitar body.
Neck: six thin bands (6 wide × 4 deep) stacked straight — matches real neck proportions.
Headstock flares back out for the tuner spread.
Each villa: two solid stories and a brown roof, repeated across the grounds.
The lagoon is landscaping on its own ground plates — it never has to touch the podium.
